title: cousinia leiocephala
intro: Cousinia leiocephala is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Cousinia or Cousinia leiocephala. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Cousinia leiocephala is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
